summary: Detailed per-stage model sourcing plan for the 4-stage listing generation pipeline. Each stage specifies: pre-trained model options, custom training approach, datasets, training infrastructure (local RTX 5070 or free Colab/Kaggle), and estimated time. Includes a hybrid Checker design using Vectara HHEM (439MB hallucination detector) plus Python rule checks, eliminating the need for a full LLM at the checking stage.
